examples: The pheasant is a close relative of the guinea hen.
A pack of hunting dogs shot an Iowa man as he went to retrieve a fallen pheasant, authorities said.
Green tents at the bottom of Pheasant Wood mark the position of eight pits dug hurriedly behind the German lines in 1916.
Percy the pheasant has taken up residence in the grounds of Towerview Primary School in Bangor.
Thanks to the game reserve, menus will seasonally feature wild boar, venison, pheasant, hare, and rabbit.
